description: Being compact and easy to produce, the Quail-class is a cheaper alternative to the mainstay miner-freighters of the N+S fleet. Outfitted for minor salvage and mining operations, the Quail is focused on finding and exploiting lower profile material POIs, being more than capable of conducting strip-mining operations, low-tier core sampling, and light salvage work. Compared to its larger sister vessel(s), the Quail-class is a vulture among hawks, smaller, more agile, and generally more opportunistic in its operations.
